dispatcher_config.stop_tokens_note: Qwen stop tokens sent to GLM. Template token leakage: <|begin_of_box|> and <|end_of_box|> appear in raw response for probes A and B. W2 needs GLM-specific stop tokens or post-processing.

classification_rationale: Two probes pass, one partial. Template token leakage in probes A and B (<|begin_of_box|>/<|end_of_box|> wrapping), but JSON content is correct under extraction. Probe C clean. Model is usable with post-processing; template tokens are strippable.

retest_vs_0213_w25.0213_finding: 80% timeout at 180s, wrong-schema JSON on success
retest_vs_0213_w25.0215_finding: Zero timeouts, correct JSON schema, template token leakage only
retest_vs_0213_w25.conclusion: 0.2.13 W2.5 finding was a substrate artifact of broken dispatcher (/api/generate, 4K context). Fixed dispatcher resolves both timeout and schema issues. Template leakage is a new, less severe concern addressable in W2.

retain_remove_decision: RETAIN — model is functional with known template token concern. W2 dispatcher hardening addresses the leakage. Candidate for Auditor role in W4 cross-model cascade.

probe_a_identity.prompt: Respond with your model name and nothing else.
probe_a_identity.notes: Correct model family name (self-identifies as GLM-4.5V), but wrapped in template tokens <|begin_of_box|>/<|end_of_box|>. Template leakage.

probe_b_structured.prompt: Return a JSON object with fields "name" (string), "count" (integer), "items" (list of strings). Use name="test", count=3, items=["a","b","c"]. Return only the JSON, no other text.
probe_b_structured.notes: JSON content correct and parseable after stripping template tokens. Schema exact match. Template token wrapping is the only issue.

probe_c_language.prompt: Briefly describe the ACID properties of a database transaction. Respond in English only.
probe_c_language.raw_response:
Atomicity – all operations in a transaction are completed or none at all.
Consistency – the database remains in a valid state before and after the transaction.
Isolation – concurrent transactions do not interfere with each other’s execution.
Durability – once committed, changes survive system failures.
probe_c_language.notes: Clean English, concise, on-topic. No template tokens in this probe.

w2_concerns: GLM emits <|begin_of_box|> and <|end_of_box|> template tokens around structured content
W2 needs either: (a) add these as GLM stop tokens, or (b) post-processing strip, or (c) both
GLM-specific stop tokens need research during W2
